cda_swf.note: Chrysler Diagnostic Application v6 — wiTECH 2 Flash UI shell built with Adobe Flex + Parsley DI

critical_findings.name: ISecretKeyService
critical_findings.context: hidden interface for SKIM/Immobilizer key handling — declared but not implemented in SWF (delegates to wiTECH backend)

critical_findings.name: com.chrysler.cda.event.message.securitygateway
critical_findings.context: Security Gateway message namespace — used for SGW (0x74F/0x76F) authenticated routing

critical_findings.name: WiTECHServiceLoader / WebServiceBroker / WebServiceModel
critical_findings.context: wiTECH backend service architecture — confirms CDA delegates real UDS to remote backend

critical_findings.name: READ_PROXI / READ_EOL / READ_102A_EOL / EOL_102A
critical_findings.context: confirms PROXI 22 20 23 + EOL 22 10 2A + EOL alt 22 40 A2 are all directly named

critical_findings.name: service/services.xml
critical_findings.context: the wiTECH service definition file — confirms the 285 backend endpoints come from this

critical_findings.name: CodeCard input is 5 DECIMAL digits
critical_findings.context: UI label: "Enter Code Card Data (5 digits)" — range 00000-99999. The 5-byte hex constants 4083618902 and 3E07860DAD found in IL near 27 04 frames are NOT raw CodeCards — they are computed/transformed/expected values.

critical_findings.name: Yellow Adapter requirement
critical_findings.context: Body Computer Marelli 1G ECUs require physical YELLOW adapter (OBD pin 1+9 → interface pin 6+14) for legacy non-CAN buses.

critical_findings.name: Demo mode limits
critical_findings.context: 15-minute runtime limit, only first active diagnostic available, no manual connect. All other features operate in demo.

critical_findings.name: License activation flow
critical_findings.context: Email license request to dealer or info@alfaobd.com → receive activation code → enter in About tab → Activate.

critical_findings.name: Update endpoint
critical_findings.context: Application checks http://www.alfaobd.com/update.txt at startup. Auto-downloads updates if newer version available.
